name: Rosetta Brands
description: The UK's only Vendor-as-a-Service for FMCG brands on Amazon. Provides vendor account access, Prime badging, growth marketing, compliance handling, and proprietary platform technology for consumer brands.

skills.name: Vendor-as-a-Service (VaaS)
skills.description: Amazon Vendor Central access, Prime badging, purchase order management, fulfilment via Amazon Freight, compliance and chargeback handling for FMCG brands

skills.name: Growth Marketing
skills.description: Amazon Ads management (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, DSP), A+ Content, Brand Store, product launch, and creative production

skills.name: Platform Technology
skills.description: Proprietary order automation, client portal for real-time visibility, listing health monitoring, and performance reporting
